summary: P0 Cross-Browser Fix Testing Complete - All features verified. Backend: R2 proxy CORS endpoints working (6/6 tests passed). Frontend: Mobile (390px) and Desktop (1920px) dashboards display correctly with poster-first hero strategy, gradient fallbacks, no ERR_BLOCKED_BY_ORB errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js line 21-28: mediaUrl() correctly routes R2 CDN URLs through backend proxy (/api/media/r2/{path})
Dashboard.js line 97-198: HeroSection implements poster-first strategy - poster loads eagerly, video only after poster succeeds, 2s poster timeout, 4s video timeout
Dashboard.js line 174-181: Hero poster img has crossOrigin='anonymous' and loading='eager' for Safari compatibility
Dashboard.js line 184-196: Hero video has poster attribute, crossOrigin='anonymous', preload='metadata' for Safari
SafeImage.jsx line 9-13: safeMediaUrl() auto-converts R2 CDN URLs to proxy URLs
SafeImage.jsx line 100-124: SafeImage handles image errors with retry and gradient fallback
safeMediaUrl.js: Shared utility for R2→proxy URL conversion
media_proxy.py line 15-26: OPTIONS handler returns proper CORS headers (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *)
media_proxy.py line 91-154: GET handler supports Range requests for video playback, returns proper Content-Type
seed_data_creation: None - used existing story: The Painter of Stars (261430a2-28f5-4c40-bac2-35f8d275fae7)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 cross-browser fix fully verified. Key findings: 1) R2 CDN URLs now route through backend proxy (/api/media/r2/{path}) for CORS compatibility, 2) OPTIONS endpoint returns Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *, 3) GET endpoint returns proper Content-Type (image/jpeg) and Accept-Ranges: bytes, 4) Hero uses poster-first strategy with aggressive timeouts (2s poster, 4s video), 5) SafeImage auto-converts R2 URLs and provides gradient fallback on error, 6) No ERR_BLOCKED_BY_ORB errors in console on either mobile or desktop, 7) Mobile (390px): Hero 60vh with gradient fallback, FEATURED badge, title, hook, CTA visible, sticky bottom nav visible, 8) Desktop (1920px): Hero 72vh, 4 metrics strip, Trending row with cards, sticky nav hidden.

mobile_hero_displays_poster_or_gradient.details: Hero displays gradient fallback (poster-first strategy working), never black/blank

mobile_hero_title_badge_cta.details: FEATURED badge, title 'The Painter of Stars', hook text, Continue Story CTA all visible

mobile_story_cards_image_or_gradient.details: Story cards display images or gradient fallbacks, no broken icons

mobile_trending_now_row.details: Trending Now row renders with 18 visible cards

mobile_sticky_bottom_nav.details: Sticky bottom nav visible with Home, Explore, Create, Stories, Profile

desktop_hero_displays_poster_or_gradient.details: Hero displays gradient fallback at 72vh (576px), never black/blank

desktop_hero_featured_badge_title_hook_c.details: FEATURED badge, title, hook text, Continue Story + Remix CTAs all visible

desktop_metrics_strip_4_metrics.details: Metrics strip shows 4 metrics: Continue 80%, Share 80%, K-Factor 2, Live 0

desktop_trending_row_cards.details: Trending row shows 18 cards with images or gradient fallbacks

desktop_no_orb_errors.details: No ERR_BLOCKED_BY_ORB errors in console (R2 CDN blocking eliminated)
